Trigger and call another sub flow.
Call a flow that has \"Callable Flow\" t: Call a flow that has "Callable Flow" trigger
Return response to the original flow: Return response to the original flow
The flow to execute. Only published flow: The flow to execute. Only published flows with a "Callable Flow" trigger appear here — unpublished or disabled subflows are hidden.
Choose Simple for key-value or Advanced: Choose Simple for key-value or Advanced for JSON.
Waiting to be triggered from another flo: Waiting to be triggered from another flow
The schema to be passed to the flow: The schema to be passed to the flow
Split a CSV file into chunks and dispatc: Split a CSV file into chunks and dispatch each chunk to a subflow ("Callable Flow") for processing. Set the chunk size below; when left empty it defaults to 5000 rows.
The CSV file to split and process.
The subflow that processes each chunk. O: The subflow that processes each chunk. Only published flows with a "Callable Flow" trigger appear here; disabled flows are marked "(inactive)".
The delimiter used in the CSV file.
Static data merged into every chunk payl: Static data merged into every chunk payload sent to the subflow.
Number of rows per chunk. Defaults to 50: Number of rows per chunk. Defaults to 5000 when left empty.
